summary: Patched gateway watchdog to skip duplicate start attempts when the gateway port is already healthy, and upgraded Quandalf's design grammar toward mechanism-first, richer management-aware exploration.
follow_up_titles: Trace and neutralize duplicate watchdog launcher instances if gateway-noise still persists after the patched watchdog is the active instance
notes: Watchdog now checks port 18789 before starting. Quandalf orders now carry design axes, broader management expressions, and mechanism-first guidance without hard-caging exploration.
